title: ZeroFox
description: The ZeroFox connector imports threat intelligence from the ZeroFox platform into OpenCTI via its CTI data feeds. ZeroFox specializes in digital risk protection, monitoring social media, the dark web, and external attack surfaces for brand threats, phishing, account takeovers, and credential exposure. The feeds available depend on the ZeroFox subscription tier.
short_description: Imports ZeroFox digital risk intelligence feeds into OpenCTI, covering brand threats, phishing, dark web exposure, and external attack surface data. Requires a ZeroFox CTI subscription.
